query:
-- Find Xero billing items for ASG Hail Pty Ltd
SELECT 
  bi.externalId, bi.description, bi.quantity, bi.unitAmount, bi.lineAmount,
  bi.invoiceDate, bi.billingPlatform, bi.serviceExternalId, bi.contactName,
  bi.matchStatus
FROM billing_items bi
WHERE bi.contactName LIKE '%ASG Hail%'
  AND bi.billingPlatform LIKE '%Xero%'
ORDER BY bi.invoiceDate DESC
LIMIT 10;

-- Find Xero billing items for ASG Hail Pty Ltd
SELECT 
  bi.externalId, bi.description, bi.quantity, bi.unitAmount, bi.lineAmount,
  bi.invoiceDate, bi.billingPlatform, bi.serviceExternalId, bi.contactName,
  bi.matchStatus
FROM billing_items bi
WHERE bi.contactName LIKE '%ASG Hail%'
  AND bi.billingPlatform LIKE '%Xero%'
ORDER BY bi.invoiceDate DESC
LIMIT 10;
